title: Wizard's Gauntlet
body:
### Requires:
[Wizard's Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards-reborn)

### [The Fluffy Village](https://fluffy-village.dev/pages/eng/creations/wizards_gauntlet.html)

# About:

Replaces the Arcane Wand from **[Wizard's Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards-reborn)** with a gauntlet.

![](https://fluffy-village.dev/assets/creations/wizards_gauntlet/gauntlet.png)

For displaying the gauntlet correctly, you should disable the Arcane Wand animations in the mod config.
